Package org.eventb.internal.ui.wizards

Class EventBProjectValidator

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.ui.wizards.EventBProjectValidator
public class EventBProjectValidator extends Object
Validates an event-B project name. When the project is valid, allows to retrieve the corresponding event-B project.

    String
    getErrorMessage()
    Returns the error message computed by the last call to validate(String).

    Returns the event-B project named with the name passed to the last call to validate(String).

    Returns whether the last call to validate(String) produced an error.

    validate(String name)
    Attempt to validate the given name as an event-B project name that exists, is open and writable.

  • Method Details

    • getErrorMessage

      public String getErrorMessage()
      Returns the error message computed by the last call to validate(String).
      Returns:
      the error message

    • getEventBProject

      public IEventBProject getEventBProject()
      Returns the event-B project named with the name passed to the last call to validate(String).
      Returns:
      the event-B project or null in case of error

    • hasError

      public boolean hasError()
      Returns whether the last call to validate(String) produced an error.
      Returns:
      whether an error was detected

    • setErrorMessage

      private void setErrorMessage(String msg)

    • validate

      public void validate(String name)
      Attempt to validate the given name as an event-B project name that exists, is open and writable.
      Parameters:
      name - project name to check
